title: licania ternatensis
intro: Licania ternatensis, also known as the Ternate licania or the velvet tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Chrysobalanaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Licania ternatensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are then used to treat a range of health conditions.
